# Description

Describe what this change does and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI or tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `terraform fmt -check -recursive` passes
- [ ] `terraform validate` passes for the module and both examples
- [ ] Documentation updated where behavior changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under Unreleased
- [ ] No secrets, real domains or account IDs committed
